string.text: Just Give Up Man Loaded Successfully.!
Thank you for coming, My {?CONVERSATION_NPC.GENDER}Lady{?}Lord{\\?}.
I see your situation is dire. Do you want to surrender and spare your people from further suffering?
We are starving to death. The city is yours.
We can't hold on any longer. Please have mercy, the castle is yours.
The soldiers are on the verge of mutiny, there is no food left. We surrender.
We are grateful for your mercy!
As your new lord who saves you from starvation, I grant you mercy.
You made a wise choice. Lay down your arms, I spare your lives.
Kalradia will remember this cruelty!
Let's see if you can fight on an empty stomach.
It is too late to beg for mercy. I am coming to crush you.
STOP, We cannot fight you. We surrender!
We accept your surrender. Lay down your arms!
No, you all will be death. Prepare!
A wise choice. You shall be spared.
Enemy forces have surrendered!
The battle continues!
{SETTLEMENT_NAME} wants to negotiate surrender with you.
Surrender Negotiation
Accept Meeting
Reject Offer
Starvation has broken the siege stalemate; battle begins!
The starving defenders have launched a desperate sally out!
Siege Settings
General Surrender Tendency
Overall multiplier for the surrender chance. Higher values make surrenders more likely.
Base Surrender Threshold
Base value for the surrender calculation. Higher values make surrenders less likely. Default is 2.5.
Player Mercy Multiplier
Multiplier for the player's Mercy/Cruelty trait effect. 100 is default. 0 disables it. 200 doubles it.
Calculating Trait Multiplier
Multiplier for the defending lords' 'Calculating' trait. 100 is default.
Valor Trait Multiplier
Multiplier for the defending lords' 'Valor' trait. 100 is default.
Mercy Trait Multiplier
Multiplier for the defending lords' 'Mercy' trait. 100 is default.
Honor Trait Multiplier
Multiplier for the defending lords' 'Honor' trait. 100 is default.
Nearby Enemy Lord Strength (%)
Percentage of nearby enemy lord strength to add to defender power. Higher values make defenders see enemy lords as threatening. Default 50%.
Enemy Lord Detection Range
How far away (in map distance) to detect enemy lords gathering nearby. Default is 50.
